tracking_issue.title: Epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow
tracking_issue.description:
Replace the email/Excel leave process with a configurable, auditable digital workflow that enforces balance checks, routes multi-level approvals, and supports a pilot-first rollout.

**Business value:** Cuts balance errors and approval delays, gives HR a full audit trail, and lets the platform scale the same workflow to new clients through configuration rather than rebuild.

**In scope:**
- Leave request submission and balance/quota validation
- Configurable multi-level approval circuit (manager, optional HR above threshold)
- Delegation of approval authority
- Auto-escalation after 5 business days of inaction
- HR-validated cancellation, including already-started leave
- Email and in-app notifications on key workflow events
- One-way sync of approved leave to calendar
- Role-based permissions overlaying delegation
- Per-client/country entitlement and circuit configuration
- Audit trail of requests, approvals and rule changes
- Pilot rollout for a single client/tenant

**Out of scope:**
- Payroll integration
- Two-way calendar sync
- Reporting dashboards and analytics beyond the audit log
- Migration of historical leave requests
- Authoring entitlement templates for countries beyond the pilot

### Issues

- [ ] Define the approval circuit configuration model
- [ ] Extend Leave/Absence data model
- [ ] Build the balance/quota check service
- [ ] Implement the approval workflow engine
- [ ] Add auto-escalation after 5 business days
- [ ] Build delegation overlay on approval permissions
- [ ] Build HR-validated cancellation flow
- [ ] Configure role-based permissions
- [ ] Wire up notifications for key workflow events
- [ ] Integrate one-way calendar sync
- [ ] Build audit trail for requests and rule changes
- [ ] Build frontend for request submission, approval and cancellation
- [ ] QA: acceptance and concurrency test suite
- [ ] Configure pilot tenant and rollout

issues.title: Define the approval circuit configuration model
issues.description:
Spike to design how approval circuits (manager, HR threshold, escalation rules) are configured per client, country and contract, since rules vary and this shapes the rest of the build.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Extend Leave/Absence data model
issues.description:
Add approval status, approver chain, balance snapshot, delegation reference, escalation timestamp and calendar reference to the existing Leave/Absence entity.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build the balance/quota check service
issues.description:
Real-time check of remaining balance at submission and re-check at each approval step; must be concurrency-safe for overlapping/simultaneous requests.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Implement the approval workflow engine
issues.description:
Build the state machine for submitted -> manager -> optional HR -> approved/rejected, driven by the configured circuit from #1.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Add auto-escalation after 5 business days
issues.description:
Timer-based escalation to the next approver/HR when no action is taken; must handle business-day calculation and be race-safe against last-minute approvals.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build delegation overlay on approval permissions
issues.description:
Allow a delegate to act on behalf of an approver without duplicating permission logic; ensure delegate actions race safely against the escalation timer.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build HR-validated cancellation flow
issues.description:
Separate workflow for cancelling a request, including leave already in progress, requiring explicit HR validation before finalizing.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Configure role-based permissions
issues.description:
Implement permission rules for Employee, Manager, HR and Administrator, with HR as sole editor of approved requests and sole validator of cancellations.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Wire up notifications for key workflow events
issues.description:
Send email and in-app notifications on submission, approval, rejection, escalation and cancellation, routed to the correct role/actor.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Integrate one-way calendar sync
issues.description:
Push approved leave dates to the external calendar system; system remains source of truth, no calendar-to-system sync.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build audit trail for requests and rule changes
issues.description:
Log every state transition, approval decision and edit to entitlement/circuit templates for compliance and traceability.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build frontend for request submission, approval and cancellation
issues.description:
Employee-facing submission form, manager/HR approval queue with balance visibility, and cancellation request UI.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: QA: acceptance and concurrency test suite
issues.description:
Cover approve/reject scenarios across the full circuit, overlapping-request revalidation, escalation timing, and delegate-vs-escalation race conditions.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Configure pilot tenant and rollout
issues.description:
Set up the pilot client's approval circuit, entitlement rules and permissions in an isolated tenant configuration, without migrating historical leave data.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_
